title: M&SENSE Creamy Vanilla Pie Extra Large Soy Scented Candle Gifts for Women, 990g 150H Candles for Men Long Burning, 3-Wick Home Fragrance Strong Scented Candle, Sweet Organic Candles for Home Decor
features: 3 Wick Extra Large Candle - Using 3 lead-free cotton wicks for a consistent and even burn result. This candle with 3 self-trimming cotton wicks is designed to offer stronger scent throw and enhance the ambiance of larger spaces

Natural Soy Blend Wax - Made from premium soy wax and palm wax (a natural and renewable wax derived from the oil of the palm fruit). Palm wax has a higher melting point (60℃), therefore scented candles made with this formula burn more slowly and last longer than 100% soy wax candles, and it also improves the fragrance throw

Aesthetic Jar Candles - The exquisite flower pattern design brings a touch of nature's charm. With the elegant gold sticker, it creates a luxurious and sophisticated look. This makes our candle an ideal choice for home decoration, as it effortlessly enhances the aesthetic appeal of any living space

Various Scents for Many Gift Occasions - This scented candle is delivered in an elegant gift box, making it a perfect gift for women or men! Suitable for any occasion: Christmas, Happy Birthday, Mother's Day, Father's Day, Anniversary Gift, Thanksgiving Day, Valentine's Day
